paragraphs.text: Configure a hypothetical stack across compute, storage, network, and support tiers. The estimator below produces a per-line-item monthly breakdown and a projected annual total. Required fields validate in real time with red/green border states.
Estimates exclude applicable taxes, optional GPU add-ons, and dedicated IP fees. Pricing reflects current published rates and is subject to change. Quotes generated by this tool are non-binding.
Independent, side-by-side comparison of five competing cloud hosting tiers — from Nano to Enterprise — across compute, storage, and network metrics.

The estimator below produces a per-line-item monthly breakdown and a projected annual total. Required fields validate in real time with red/green border states. Stack Configuration Estimator v2.4 Region required Pricing varies by region; egress fees differ on inter-region traffic. Instance Quantity 1–100 Number of identical compute instances to provision. Compute Tier Nano $0.012/hr Micro $0.024/hr Standard $0.084/hr Pro $0.196/hr Enterprise $0.640/hr Storage Types Block SSD $0.10/GB Object Storage $0.023/GB Cold Archive $0.004/GB Storage Volume GB Bandwidth TB / month Support Tier Community $0/mo Business $99/mo Enterprise $499/mo Backup Frequency Snapshots are retained for 30 days at the selected cadence.
